description: Dev environment initiator: scan composer/npm manifests, lockfiles, .env DSNs, and CI images, then generate a docker-compose.yml and Dockerfile matched to the actual stack — PHP version and extensions, Node, database engine, Redis, queues, mail. Includes /dev-env:init to generate and /dev-env:review to audit existing docker files. Pairs with stack-scan. Owns local development environments; defers CI/CD pipelines and production deploys to the devops plugin.

interface.longDescription:
Dev environment initiator: scan composer/npm manifests, lockfiles, .env DSNs, and CI images, then generate a docker-compose.yml and Dockerfile matched to the actual stack — PHP version and extensions, Node, database engine, Redis, queues, mail. Proposes the topology as a diagram before writing YAML. Includes /dev-env:init to generate and /dev-env:review to audit existing docker files. Pairs with stack-scan. Owns local development environments; defers CI/CD pipelines and production deploys to the devops plugin.

Codex fidelity: 2 faithful, 2 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).

Includes /dev-env:init to generate and /dev-env:review to audit existing docker files. Pairs with stack-scan. Owns local development environments; defers CI/CD pipelines and production deploys to the devops plugin.

name: dev-env
